description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default test stage and runs npm install in a before_script for all jobs, caching the node_modules directory per job with a cache key of $CI_JOB_NAME and untracked files enabled. Define a test:node10 job that uses the node:10 Docker image and executes the script npm run lint then npm test. Define a test:node8 job that uses the node:8 Docker image and executes the same script npm run lint then npm test. Both jobs inherit the npm install before_script and the node_modules cache.
